authority_hierarchy: Versioned specs and decisions in repo

v3_complementary_requirements.relationship: complementary — amplifies existing roadmap with exact counting contract, 13-capstone structure, 12-phase pedagogical cycle, privacy/ER/relationship-scoring principles
v3_complementary_requirements.does_not: replace, reduce, or renumber the existing 52 sections in learning_roadmap.md
adds: Exact counting: 416 subtopics, 1248 exercises, 1248 exam variants (current state has ~240 concepts, not yet at V3 target)

12-phase per-section cycle: RESEARCH → OUTCOMES_LOCKED → BLUEPRINT_LOCKED → CONTENT_AUTHORED → PRACTICE_AUTHORED → ASSESSMENTS_AUTHORED → TECHNICALLY_VERIFIED → EQUIVALENCE_REVIEWED → ACCESSIBILITY_FAIRNESS_REVIEWED → PILOTED_OR_PROVISIONAL → RELEASED → RETROSPECTIVE_COMPLETE
Privacy principle: entity resolution ≠ relationship scoring ≠ risk triage
5 transversal checkpoints: CF-1(S13), CF-2(S26), CF-3(S39), CF-4(S47), CF-5(S51)

contradictions_identified.issue: V3 defines different section topics than existing learning_roadmap.md for S1-S13
contradictions_identified.v3_s1: Entorno reproducible y trabajo seguro (Runtime, venv, Git, Quality)
contradictions_identified.existing_s1: Setup & Entorno de Desarrollo (Python, VS Code, venv, Git, requirements.txt, GitHub PR)
contradictions_identified.resolution: Existing roadmap governs section IDs and titles. V3 topic structure (4 topics × 2 subtopics) is a TARGET to add within each existing section, not a replacement.
contradictions_identified.authority: learning_roadmap.md is primary; V3 adds counting + capstone requirements

contradictions_identified.issue: V3 has 13 capstones; existing has 4 (S13, S26, S39, S51)
contradictions_identified.resolution: Adopt V3's 13-capstone structure. Existing 4 capstones map to: S13→CP-N1-C, S26→CP-N2-C, S39→CP-N3-C, S51→CP-N4-C. Add 9 new capstone gates at S4/S8/S17/S21/S30/S34/S43/S47 + CP-FINAL at S52.
contradictions_identified.authority: V3 capstone structure adopted as it's more granular and pedagogically sound

contradictions_identified.issue: Existing sections have 3-5 exam concepts each (~240 total); V3 requires 8 subtopics × 3 variants = 24 variants per section (1248 total)
contradictions_identified.resolution: Current exam specs are a STARTING POINT. V3 target requires expanding each section to 8 subtopics (4 topics × 2). This is a multi-session production effort, not a single-pass fix.
contradictions_identified.authority: V3 counting contract is the target; current state is provisional

contract_tests.finish_reason: validated — stop is only terminal; tool_calls is intermediate
